text: Performs differential expression top (adverse) bottom (favorable) phenotype groups versus rest. Seurat input, uses Seurat::FindMarkers. matrix, Matrix, SingleCellExperiment input, uses Wilcoxon-based path (presto available, else base R) require Seurat.

title: Find Unique Marker Genes for Adverse and Favorable Phenotype Groups — find_phenotype_markers
code: find_phenotype_markers(   expression,   group_labels,   group_column = NULL,   cell_id_column = "cell_id",   marker_scope = c("phenotype_groups", "cell_type_specific"),   cell_type_column = NULL,   assay = NULL,   slot = "data",   test.use = c("wilcox", "t", "roc", "negbinom", "poisson", "LR"),   min.pct = 0.1,   logfc.threshold = 0.25,   pval_threshold = 0.05,   verbose = TRUE,   max_cells_per_ident = 5000L,   validate_expression_axes = TRUE,   celltype_unique_genes = TRUE,   celltype_contrast = c("within_cell_type", "vs_cohort_rest"),   ... )

title: Find Unique Marker Genes for Adverse and Favorable Phenotype Groups — find_phenotype_markers
text: expression Expression matrix (genes x cells), Matrix (e.g. dgCMatrix), Seurat object, SingleCellExperiment. Must match cells group_labels. group_labels Either character vector group labels ("Adverse", "Favorable", "") order columns expression, data.frame define_phenotype_groups() (see group_column). group_column group_labels data.frame, name column containing "Adverse" / "Favorable" / "". cell_id_column group_labels data.frame, column name cell/sample IDs (default "cell_id"). marker_scope Either: "phenotype_groups": find markers adverse favorable phenotype groups globally (cell type agnostic; default). "cell_type_specific": cell type, find markers cells type adverse (favorable) tail vs reference group controlled celltype_contrast (default: cell type, tail; use "vs_cohort_rest" original cohort-wide contrast). cell_type_column marker_scope = "cell_type_specific", column group_labels contains cell type labels. assay Assay name Seurat/SCE (e.g. "RNA"). slot Layer Seurat: "data", "counts", "scale.data" (default "data"). test.use Seurat test.use: "wilcox" (default), "t", "roc", "negbinom", "poisson", "LR". min.pct Minimum fraction cells expressing gene either group (default 0.1). Passed FindMarkers. logfc.threshold Minimum absolute log2 fold change (default 0.25). Passed FindMarkers. pval_threshold Maximum unadjusted p-value include (default 0.05). verbose Print progress messages (default TRUE). max_cells_per_ident phenotype group exceeds many cells, subsample limit FindMarkers (default 5000). Reduces memory large objects. Set Inf disable. validate_expression_axes TRUE (default), check expression matrix genes \(\times\) cells (transpose clear samples \(\times\) genes layout detected) normalize colnames ID matching. Use log-normalized (e.g. log1p CPM) data matrix input possible. celltype_unique_genes marker_scope = "cell_type_specific" TRUE (default), gene kept one row across adverse favorable marker tables: row largest avg_log2FC (tie-break p_adj). avoids gene (e.g. highly expressed housekeeping transcripts) appearing top marker many cell-type blocks. Set FALSE retain significant hits per block. celltype_contrast marker_scope = "cell_type_specific": "within_cell_type" (default) compares phenotype tail within cell type phenotype groups cell type . "vs_cohort_rest" restores original behaviour: (cell type \(\cap\) tail) vs cells dataset (cell types phenotype groups). ... Additional arguments passed Seurat::FindMarkers input Seurat object (ignored matrix/SCE/Matrix input).

title: Find Unique Marker Genes for Adverse and Favorable Phenotype Groups — find_phenotype_markers
text: list : adverse_markers: data.frame genes markers adverse (top score) group (vs rest). favorable_markers: data.frame genes markers favorable (bottom score) group (vs rest). data.frame columns: gene, avg_log2FC, pct_in_group, pct_rest, p_val, p_adj. marker_scope = "cell_type_specific", row one gene one cell type; cell_type column identifies type -group anchored . celltype_contrast = "within_cell_type" (default), reference phenotype groups within cell type; "vs_cohort_rest", reference cells phenotype label (original behaviour).

title: Find Unique Marker Genes for Adverse and Favorable Phenotype Groups — find_phenotype_markers

title: Plot phenotype marker gene heatmaps (ComplexHeatmap) — plot_phenotype_markers
text: markers List returned find_phenotype_markers() elements adverse_markers favorable_markers. expr_mat Numeric matrix, genes \(\times\) cells (column names = cell IDs). meta Data frame cell metadata least cell_id_col, group_col, score_col, celltype_col. cell_id_col Column meta cell IDs matching colnames(expr_mat). group_col Column phenotype groups (Favorable, , Adverse). score_col Column continuous phenotype scores top color bar. celltype_col Column cell type labels. celltype_palette Named vector colors cell types. NULL, get_celltype_palette() used. heatmap_type "global" (cell-type agnostic markers) "cell_type_specific" (markers per cell type marker_scope = "cell_type_specific"). top_n_markers Maximum number genes keep per contrast block (per tail global; per phenotype bin \(\times\) cell type cell-type-specific). rank_by rank genes selecting top markers heatmap. "lfc" ranks decreasing avg_log2FC among significant genes (p_adj < p_adj_threshold). "p_adj" ranks increasing p_adj additionally requires avg_log2FC > 1 (p_adj < p_adj_threshold) small effects selected purely due sample size. n_mark_labels Number row labels draw per block via ComplexHeatmap::anno_mark (top genes avg_log2FC within block). p_adj_threshold genes p_adj value (positive avg_log2FC) candidates ordering log fold change. scale_clip Length-2 numeric vector c(lo, hi) applied row scaling (values outside clipped). NULL, uses c(-3, 3) heatmap_type = "global" c(-5, 5) cell-type-specific. heatmap_width Optional heatmap width passed ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(width = ...). Accepts grid::unit single number interpreted millimeters. heatmap_height Optional heatmap height passed ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(height = ...). Accepts grid::unit single number interpreted millimeters. column_title Optional title heatmap. draw TRUE (default), calls ComplexHeatmap::draw(). FALSE, returns Heatmap object invisibly. use_raster Passed Heatmap() (default FALSE). outline_marker_blocks TRUE (default) heatmap_type = "cell_type_specific", draws white outline boxes around marker-gene block draw(). Set FALSE omit .

title: Plot phenotype marker gene heatmaps (ComplexHeatmap) — plot_phenotype_markers
text: Invisibly, ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap object (NULL nothing plotted).

title: Plot phenotype marker gene heatmaps (ComplexHeatmap) — plot_phenotype_markers
text: Requires suggested packages ComplexHeatmap circlize. heatmap_type = "global", rows favorable-marker genes adverse-genes (duplicate genes adverse block). Columns ordered PhenoMapR score (score_col) low high across cells expr_mat. cell_type_specific, columns follow phenotype group, cell type, score within block (see find_phenotype_markers grouping logic); rows follow phenotype bin cell type, matching column order. Column annotations (top bottom): phenotype group, cell type, PhenoMapR score (nearest heatmap first); annotation names right; legends drawn explicitly (Legend() + annotation_legend_list; merge_legends = TRUE correct parameter name merge_legends). PhenoMapR score colors diverging blue–white–red white 0: negative scores blue, positive scores red. score column coerced plain numeric vector (matrix columns, e.g. scale(), corrupt subsetting). Limits use heatmap column scores ; merged legend uses explicit Legend(= ...) tick positions rounded whole numbers (annotation auto-legends disabled). Row annotations: left_annotation, first track leftmost (farthest matrix). heatmap_type = "cell_type_specific", order anno_mark (outer), cell type, phenotype bin (adjacent heatmap). right_annotation, strips first (next heatmap): phenotype cell type, anno_mark outermost. Favorable-tail strips gene marks left, adverse right. heatmap_type = "cell_type_specific", optional white outline boxes (outline_marker_blocks) use decorate_heatmap_body per row slice column span native units box covers columns whose group_col/celltype_col match block (see outline_marker_blocks). Row-split slice titles suppressed. Heatmap fill uses ColorBrewer RdGy (11-class): high scaled expression = red, low = black. Heatmap column annotation legends merge right (merge_legends = TRUE; extra right padding PDFs). row_gap = 0 split blocks.
